title: Happiness of Kati
original_title: ความสุขของกะทิ
overview: Kati, a nine-year-old girl whose mother is suffering from an incurable illness. She must go through steps of happiness and sorrow, bonding and separation, having her hopes fulfilled and losing something she loves.
